title: Add SillyTavern-Localyze to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [SillyTavern-Localyze](https://github.com/ZapoVerde/SillyTavern-Localyze) to image
- Detects new locations in roleplay and autogenerates environment visuals via the Pollinations.ai API; SillyTavern-Localyze lets users refine prompts, regenerate images, or toggle automation.

Fixes #10034

gist.headline: Tavern Tales Visualized
gist.blurb: SillyTavern-Localyze just joined the ecosystem! It automatically detects new locations in your roleplay and generates environment visuals on the fly.
gist.summary: Added SillyTavern-Localyze to the community showcase, an app that detects new locations in roleplay and autogenerates environment visuals using the Pollinations API.
gist.impact: Roleplayers can now automatically generate, refine, and toggle background visuals for their scenes as the story progresses.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy fantasy tavern setting representing 'SillyTavern' and roleplay. Polly the bee as a tiny wizard or adventurer, interacting with the Monitor Robot who is displaying a newly generated environment (like a forest or dungeon) on its screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a warm, dimly lit fantasy tavern. The cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat sits at a wooden table with a map, while the chunky monitor robot displays a beautiful glowing forest landscape on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm amber gradient lighting. Chunky retro sprites, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a warm, dimly lit fantasy tavern. The cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat sits at a wooden table with a map, while the chunky monitor robot displays a beautiful glowing forest landscape on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm amber gradient lighting. Chunky retro sprites, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, emotionally warm.
